text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at an amusement park on a day off,
 when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Roll, roll, roller coaster! Amusement
 parks are the best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wowie. You're really happy today, huh,
 El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe! Are you ready?! We're about to
 have the time of our lives!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Haha! It just hit me! You're feeling pretty
 down, aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Do you have psychic
 abilities?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth... I can't sing or
 dance very well, so I don't feel very
 confident about winning concerts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And the council president told me to
 think about why we have winning
 concerts in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Why... why... How am I supposed to
 know why?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Sounds like you're missing something
 important. Don't worry, I'll show you how
 to make a grand entrance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go! To the scream machine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? The s-scream machine?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few minutes later, I hear Special
 Week's faint screams carried on the
 wind.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... I think I saw the Three Goddesses back there...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, Spe?! Did you figure it out yet?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing! Amusement parks are
 so cool! They're almost as great as a box
 full of potatoes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Then let's choose our last ride.
 There are two choices!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The longest, greatest, most
 screamworthy roller coaster in the world!
 Or... the teacups!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A roller coaster or teacups? That's like
 choosing between super spicy and super
 sweet!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, well put.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, then... You there! Our fates rest in
 your hands!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What should our last ride be? The
 world's longest roller coaster?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Or the teacups? The choice is yours!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mom! I... I'm going to try my best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hah! AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's screams last the entire
 length of the world's longest roller
 coaster!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! They're so cute! There's no
 way I can't handle this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, you're sweet as sugar and just
 as innocent. But life is like a box of
 jalapenos!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa spins the cup with all her
 might, leaving Special Week completely
 dizzy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... My head keeps spinning... But
 that was... so... fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: There are so many fun rides here, it's like the park itself wants us to have fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You get it now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My papi's a pro wrestler. He always told
 me to be like an amusement park!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We may be athletes, but we must never
 forget our guests!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Same thing goes for winning concerts.
 Can you be like an amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'm going to be a roller
 coaster!
